title: Woman of Tokyo
writer: Tadao Ikeda, Kôgo Noda, Yasujirô Ozu
actors: Yoshiko Okada, Ureo Egawa, Kinuyo Tanaka
plot: Ryoichi and Chikako are brother and sister. They live together. Chikako works during the day in an office and at night she prostitutes herself to fund her brother's studies at the university. Ryoichi doesn't know about his sister'...
